data.title: India's AI workforce experiences a 15x productivity increase with Claude.ai users finishing tasks in 15 mins - 3.8 hrs tasks. Software tasks at 45.2%.
data.description: According to the latest Anthropic Economic Index, users in India using Claude.ai are able to complete tasks that typically take 3.8 hours in just 15 minutes, surpassing the global average. The majority of these tasks, accounting for 45.2%, are related to software. This data highlights the efficiency and speed at which Indian users on Claude.ai are able to accomplish tasks compared to their counterparts worldwide.

data.title: Polkadot aims $1.50 despite obstacles; RSI at 37.53 may hinder at $1.35. Recovery possible if $1.31 support remains strong by Feb.
data.description: The price of DOT is currently at $1.35, facing a bearish trend with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 37.53. However, there is potential for a technical rebound that may drive Polkadot towards the $1.50 resistance level, provided that crucial support at $1.31 is maintained throughout February.

data.title: GLM-5 launch marks shift in AI toward engineers. Large language models now build complete systems. Strong open-source model for coding.
data.description: Singapore - GLM-5, recently made open source, represents a significant development in artificial intelligence. Large language models are now capable of more than just generating code snippets or interface prototypes; they can build complete systems and perform intricate end-to-end tasks. This progression indicates a shift from "vibe coding" to what experts refer to as agentic engineering. Designed for this advanced stage, GLM-5 is positioned as one of the most formidable open-source models for coding.

data.title: Italy's economy sees a boost as Visa data shows over 60% increase in overseas Visa cardholders' visits during the opening weekend of Olympic Winter Games Milano Cortina 2026.
data.description: In MILANO, Italy, Visa, the Official Payment Technology Partner of the Olympic and Paralympic Winter Games, shared data on consumer spending in host locations during the opening weekend of the Olympic Winter Games Milano Cortina 2026. VisaNet data, analyzed by Visa Consulting & Analytics, highlights the positive influence of Milano Cortina 2026 on commerce. The data revealed a significant increase of over 60% in visits by overseas Visa cardholders. This indicates a strong boost in consumer activity and showcases the economic benefits of the event.

data.title: Stock buyback programme continues in multiple stock exchanges and under Danish regulatory authority and stakeholders.
data.description: The Nasdaq Copenhagen, Euronext Dublin, and London Stock Exchange, along with the Danish Financial Supervisory Authority and various other stakeholders, are intricately involved in financial transactions and oversight.

data.title: AVAX projected to reach $12-15 by March 2026, expecting 30-60% upside. Current price at $9.28 indicates oversold bounce potential.
data.description: Analysts are optimistic about AVAX's potential, expecting a significant 30-60% increase with a target price range of $12-15 by March. The current technical setup of the cryptocurrency at $9.28 indicates a chance for an oversold bounce.

data.title: Syngenta to launch X-Terra® Hybrid Wheat in Europe, leads in genetic technology for improving wheat productivity.
data.description: In Basel, Switzerland, Syngenta, a global leader in agricultural innovation, is at the forefront of improving wheat productivity and resilience. Wheat, the world's most genetically complex staple crop, has a genome nearly six times larger than that of humans, posing significant challenges for sequencing and study. Leveraging advances in genetic technologies, Syngenta is elevating wheat breeding by conducting comprehensive genome screenings to identify key traits. This initiative aims to enhance the quality and yield of wheat, contributing to advancements in global agriculture.

data.title: Kalmar releases TT7 terminal tractor for European market, meeting customers' demands.
data.description: Kalmar has released the new TT7 series terminal tractor tailored for European customers' high demands.

data.title: Predicting MATIC recovery by March 2026, targets $0.45-$0.52 range with 18-37% upside. Support tested at $0.38, RSI suggests reversal.
data.description: The forecast for the price of MATIC suggests a potential increase of 18-37%, reaching a range between $0.45 and $0.52. Polygon is currently testing a crucial support level at $0.38, while the neutral RSI indicates a potential upcoming reversal in the market.
Total prepayments at CK93 have been made by Totalkredit A/S.

data.title: Klarna partners with Google Pay in UK, offering interest-free payments. Exciting move for both, expanding reach.
data.description: In London, the global digital bank and flexible payments provider, Klarna, has recently launched its services on Google Pay in the UK. This means that Google Pay users in the U.K. are now able to select Klarna's interest-free payment alternatives when making purchases. Raji Behal, the Head of Western and Southern Europe, UK & Ireland at Klarna, expressed enthusiasm about this collaboration, stating, “We are thrilled to introduce Klarna’s equitable, adaptable, and interest-free payment choices to Google Pay users. This development marks a significant milestone for us and is a substantial move towards accomplishing our objective of expanding our reach."

data.title: Expect SOL to approach $95-$105 by March following technical consolidation. Short-term: $88-$92, Medium-term: $95-$105, Critical support: $80.17.
data.description: Predictions for the SOL prices are as follows: in the short term (1 week), it is anticipated to range between $88 and $92. Moving on to the medium term (1 month), the forecast suggests a range of $95 to $105. The bullish breakout level is identified at $93.75, whereas the critical support level stands at $80.17. These predictions provide insights for investors to strategize their actions in the dynamic cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Animoca Brands expands in Middle East with Dubai crypto license, approved on Feb. 5, targeting institutional investors under VARA oversight.
data.description: On February 5th, the regulatory body in Dubai granted Animoca Brands approval for a license. This license permits the company to cater to institutional and qualified investors under the supervision of Dubai's VARA.

data.title: DOGE aims $0.12 rebound in short term despite technical weakness. Targets: $0.11 (1 week), $0.11-$0.12 (1 month), support $0.09.
data.description: Summary of DOGE Price Prediction: In the short term (1 week), the target price is estimated to be $0.11. Looking ahead to the medium term (1 month), the forecast falls within the range of $0.11 to $0.12. A bullish breakout is anticipated once the price hits $0.12. It is crucial for the currency to maintain support at $0.09 to avoid significant declines.
